'''Crinbid''' was a form of [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]]. The game was played on traditional horseshoe-shaped [[warp-top]]s. The [[Tralla Room]] on the ''[[Coral Vanda]]'' contained several locations for playing crinbid.<ref name="DFR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
